narrative:
Tuscarawas County has 56,337 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a modest Republican lean of 3.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.3% of registrants. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -5.0% D−R vs -2.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
